Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are a lot of complex-looking[n]technical books lined up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are video game strategy guides[n]hidden among the technical books...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are computer magazines[n]placed among the technical books...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A book called Introduction to[n]Human Behavior is mixed in[n]among the technical books...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A book called Beginner's Guide to Owning a[n]Dog is mixed in among the many technical books...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A magazine featuring the hero[n]series Featherman is mixed in[n]among the technical books...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An advanced recipe book is mixed[n]in among the technical books...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The bookshelves are lined with a variety of[n]books from the residents living in the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
